properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 77/17
SEISMIC SURVEY 20 JULY TO 28 SEPTEMBER
BY M/V SANCO SWIFT TOWING 12 X 9000 METER 
LONG CABLES IN AREA BOUND BY
A. 70-17.00N 018-00.00E
B. 71-23.00N 016-23.00E
C. 71-24.40N 018-05.00E
D. 70-31.00N 019-18.00E

REQUESTING A WIDE BERTH, 3 NM AHEAD, PORT AND STARBOARD SIDES AND 7 NM ASTERN.
SUPPORT VESSEL MV OVEAN FORTUNE AND MV SANCO CHASER. 
WORKING CHANNAL VHF 73 AND STANDBY 16.
